column8: I have a lot of money and I don't know what to do with it. (such)I have_________________that I don't know what to do with it.
column9: Adrian fell asleep during the film because he was very tired. (so)Adrian______________he fell asleep during the film.
column10: Today was so hot that I didn't want to do anything. (such)Today was______________that I didn't want to do anything.
column11: I didn't have to open all my Christmas presents because I got so many! (such)I got___________________Christmas presents that I didn't have time to open them all.
column12: They closed the funfair because it was very dangerous. (that) The funfair_______________they closed it.
column13: The food was so spicy that I couldn't eat it. (such)We had_______________that I couldn't eat it.
